description: Bill of divorce. Dated 13 Sivan 5505 AM which is 13 June 1745 CE. Location: Cairo. The husband's name is listed solely as Menaḥem b. Yosef. Below the main text, the get bears a faint impression of square Hebrew letters, one portion of which is inverted: suggesting that the ink residue was transferred from an separate fragment. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
